zh.lifeSummary: Joane de Umfreville是Gilbert de Umfreville的女兒，於1309年出生在英國越可爾希 梅爾敦。她和Thomas de Eland至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1395年在英國越可爾艾藍德享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joane de Umfreville是Gilbert de Umfreville的女儿，于1309年出生在英国越可爾希 梅爾敦。她和Thomas de Eland至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1395年在英国越可爾艾藍德享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Umfreville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Umfreville (La Manche) or Offranville (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Joane de Umfreville was born in 1309, in High Melton, Yorkshire, England as the daughter of Gilbert de Umfreville. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Thomas de Eland. She died in 1395, in Elland, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Joane de Umfreville est née en 1309, à High Melton, Everwyck, Angleterre, fille de Gilbert de Umfreville. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Thomas d’Eland. Elle est décédée en 1395, à Elland, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Joane de Umfreville wurde 1309 in High Melton, Yorkshire, England, als Tochter von Gilbert de Umfreville geboren. Sie hatte mit Thomas de Eland mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1395 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Elland, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Joane de Umfreville è nata il nel 1309 nel High Melton, Yorkshire, England come figlia di Gilbert de Umfreville. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Thomas de Eland. Morì nel 1395, nel Elland, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane de Umfrevilleは1309年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヒグ メルトンでGilbert de Umfrevilleの娘として生まれた。彼女はThomas de Elandとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1395年にイギリスヨークシュアイアエランドで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane de Umfreville(은)는 1309년 영국 요르크실르 히그h 멜턴에서 Gilbert de Umfreville의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Thomas de Eland(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1395년 영국 요르크실르 엘랜드에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joane de Umfreville nasceu em 1309, em High Melton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filha de Gilbert de Umfreville. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Thomas de Eland. Ela faleceu em 1395, em Elland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Joane de Umfreville родилась в 1309 г. в местности хаи мелтон, еркшир, Англия. Её отца звали Gilbert de Umfreville. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Thomas de Eland. Она умерла в 1395 г. в местности элланд, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Joane de Umfreville nació en 1309, en High Melton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hija de Gilbert de Umfreville. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Thomas de Eland. Murió en 1395, en Elland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años.
